headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Baxter International, Raises Price Target to $24
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Vijay Kumar   maintains Baxter International (NYSE:BAX) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $22 to $24.
